# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because this source is a formal research paper with explicit benchmark results on SWE-bench and HumanEvalFix.

## Why

The excerpt presents empirical substance rather than commentary: named evaluation datasets, quantitative pass rates, comparison against prior state of the art, and an ablation study on interface design choices. It is clearly within institute scope as a serious published research paper reporting real experimental results.

## Limits
